description: Whitelist of rtl_433 (433 MHz) sensors that MUST survive Home Assistant MQTT cleanup. Everything else that is an rtl_433 device (MQTT device with no real manufacturer, i.e. '<unknown>') is treated as a false decode / stale ghost and removed by tools/ha_cleanup_rtl433.py. Devices that DO have a real manufacturer (Xiaomi, IKEA, TuYa, esphome, espressif, OMG_community, SensorsIot, ...) are never touched. Match is by exact HA device name (Model-<id>).
